label: U.S. shelter CPI
description: Published BLS consumer-price or FHFA purchase-only house-price index distributed through FRED.
definition: Published BLS consumer-price or FHFA purchase-only house-price index distributed through FRED.
layer: Housing purchase prices and shelter costs
comparisonLimitations: Country baskets, weights, index bases, seasonal treatment, and housing institutions differ. Compare growth rates and within-country percentiles before levels.
interpretation: Consumer affordability depends on price growth relative to wages or income, not the price index alone.
source: Official U.S. source distributed through Federal Reserve Economic Data
revisionStatus: The originating BLS, FHFA, or BEA series may be revised; FRED observations do not provide a complete publication-vintage archive here.

calculation.formula: Published BLS consumer-price or FHFA purchase-only house-price index distributed through FRED.
calculation.explanation: Published BLS consumer-price or FHFA purchase-only house-price index distributed through FRED.

limitations: The originating BLS, FHFA, or BEA series may be revised; FRED observations do not provide a complete publication-vintage archive here.
